title: The Dawn Era Delight
description: A mod that adds compatibility between Farmers delight and The Dawn Era
body:
![LogoTDED](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08a6df47b7b3fd53dab57ace4b6de29277470762.png)

The Dawn Era Delight is a addon mod for [Farmer's Delight ](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) based on the addition of dinosaur-related cooking

With this mod, you will be able to cook many new dishes related to dinosaurs
